name: Drive-by Compromise Suspicious File Download
description: Detects downloads of executable content types from uncategorized or malicious proxy categories
query:
// Detect suspicious executable downloads via proxy
// Trigger on executable content from risky categories
events from proxy
where content_type matches "(?i)(application/x-msdownload|application/x-executable|application/hta|application/x-msdos-program)"
  and category matches "(?i)(uncategorized|malware|suspicious|newly-registered)"
group by source_ip
having count(*) > 0
within 300 seconds
